name: waste-segregation-functions
description: Cloud Functions for Waste Segregation App

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.test:training-data:emulator: npm run build && ENABLE_DIAGNOSTIC_ENDPOINTS=true ALLOW_TRAINING_REVIEW_NON_ADMIN=false FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 firebase emulators:exec --project waste-segregation-app-df523 --only auth,functions,firestore "node --test test/training_data.emulator.test.js"
scripts.test:http-guards:emulator: npm run build && ENABLE_DIAGNOSTIC_ENDPOINTS=true FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 firebase emulators:exec --project waste-segregation-app-df523 --only auth,functions,firestore "node --test test/http_guards.emulator.test.js"
